task.title: Agent On-Ramp Coach plugin
task.goal: Create a production-usable cross-agent plugin for safe AI agent adoption workflows.
task.scope: Only the new plugins/agent-on-ramp-coach package, generated marketplace metadata, and local session gate artifacts.
non_goals: Do not change existing plugin behavior.
Do not create a backend service, MCP server, MCP app, or desktop app.
Do not install a personal marketplace entry.

assumptions.statement: This repository expects installable plugin packages to live under plugins/<plugin-name> with repo-compatible manifests, and the new plugin should be created there rather than in a personal ~/plugins directory.
assumptions.verification_method: Read repository plugin authoring instructions and existing plugin layout.
evidence: plugins/AGENTS.md states plugins/<plugin-name>/ is one folder per installable plugin and folder name must match name fields.
Existing plugin directories include plugins/assumption-killer, plugins/change-control-compiler, plugins/ux-gremlin, and plugins/agent-compat.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: The plugin could be scaffolded into the wrong location or omitted from repository validation.
assumptions.decision: Create plugins/agent-on-ramp-coach and do not update the personal marketplace.

assumptions.statement: The repository plugin shape requires additional host manifests and package metadata beyond the user-listed minimum tree.
assumptions.verification_method: Compare the repository plugin guide with existing plugin manifests.
evidence: plugins/AGENTS.md lists plugin.json, .codex-plugin/plugin.json, .claude-plugin/plugin.json, package.json, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, LICENSE, agents, skills, hooks, lib, schemas, templates, and test as applicable.
plugins/assumption-killer includes root plugin.json, .codex-plugin/plugin.json, .claude-plugin/plugin.json, package.json, CHANGELOG.md, LICENSE, an agent, and a skill.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: The plugin might validate as content but fail host discovery or marketplace sync.
assumptions.decision: Add repo-compatible companion manifests and package/test metadata while preserving the requested files.

assumptions.statement: Marketplace metadata is generated from plugin manifests by scripts/sync-marketplace.mjs, so plugins/marketplace.json should not be hand-edited.
assumptions.verification_method: Read the marketplace sync script and plugin guide.
evidence: plugins/AGENTS.md says plugins/marketplace.json is generated by scripts/sync-marketplace.mjs and must not be hand-edited.
scripts/sync-marketplace.mjs discovers plugin directories and builds entries from .codex-plugin/plugin.json, falling back to root plugin.json.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: A manual marketplace edit could be overwritten or fail repository checks.
assumptions.decision: Run the sync script after adding manifests and allow only generated marketplace changes.

assumptions.statement: The plugin's deterministic session tooling can be implemented with Node built-in modules only.
assumptions.verification_method: Assess requested commands and repository script conventions.
evidence: The requested script commands require JSON validation, markdown rendering, git status snapshots, and file comparison, all available through node:fs, node:path, node:child_process, node:os, and node:test.
plugins/AGENTS.md says to use Node ESM scripts in this repository unless the package already uses another runtime.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Adding dependencies would violate the request and broaden validation scope.
assumptions.decision: Implement onramp.mjs and tests with built-in Node modules only.

final_verification.notes: Agent On-Ramp Coach tests, valid example validation, expected invalid example failure, Codex plugin validation, marketplace sync, snapshot, no-edit pass, and simulated no-edit failure all completed.
